title: CLSID
text: CLSID Internal class ID of the ProgID. Description When you leave the ProgID property, CLSID field is updated with the internal class ID of the ProgID. Alternatively, enter a 32-hex-digit CLSID directly. The CLSID can confirm that the correct ProgID is entered. If a ProgID is not valid, the CLSID is set to <Unknown ProgID> , and the CLSID and Bind To fields are unavilable. If the COM ICC Driver is not available, the CLSID is set to <COM Driver not available> , and both the CLSID and Bind To fields are dimmed. Applies To Signature Implementation (COM) Related Links ProgID Name of the COM ProgID. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
